source_pr.title: util: fix unstable unit test testDiskSerialSuite.TestRemoveDir
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/19751 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

The tmpDir has been created by other spilling unit test, so init tempdir fails in this test. 

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

Check whether the directory is existed. If not, init the tmpDir.

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch 4.0

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: PR body: tmpDir may already be created by other spilling unit test, so init tempdir fails in this test
failure_signature: PR body: tmpDir may already be created by other spilling unit test, so init tempdir fails in this test
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: util: fix unstable unit test testDiskSerialSuite.TestRemoveDir.
fix_pattern: util: fix unstable unit test testDiskSerialSuite.TestRemoveDir

evidence: evidence: PR body: tmpDir may already be created by other spilling unit test, so init tempdir fails in this test
evidence: change `InitializeTempDir()` -> `CheckAndInitTempDir()` to handle existing tmpDir and stabilize test (util/disk/tempDir_test.go)
